quiz_items.question: When did the FDA's January 2023 final rule amending radiological health regulations become effective?
quiz_items.explanation: The final rule entitled 'Radiological Health Regulations; Amendments to Records and Reports for Radiation Emitting Electronic Products' was issued January 20, 2023, and went into effect on February 21, 2023.

quiz_items.question: Which Laser Notice provides guidance on conformance with IEC 60825-1 Ed. 3 and IEC 60601-2-22 Ed. 3.1?
quiz_items.explanation: Laser Notice No. 56 titled 'Laser Products - Conformance with IEC 60825-1 Ed. 3 and IEC 60601-2-22 Ed. 3.1' provides guidance for Industry and FDA Staff.

quiz_items.question: What changes did the January 2023 final rule make to reporting requirements? (Select all that apply)
options: Added new annual report requirements for all laser products
Removed or reduced some annual reports and test record requirements
Codified Laser Notice 41 policies (Low Power Laser Reporting Exemption)
Codified Laser Notice 42 policies (Compliance for manufacturers incorporating Class I products)
quiz_items.explanation: The 2023 final rule amended requirements by removing or reducing unnecessary or duplicative annual reports and test records. It also codified long-standing policies from Laser Notice 41 (Low Power Laser Reporting Exemption) and Laser Notice 42 (Clarification for manufacturers incorporating certified Class I laser products).
